string-array.name: keys_documentation_source
string-array.item: Intan…õt so nkrataa a w…îde kyer…õw

resources.string: Twam
Wontumi nhu app a wode b…õhy…õ apk
Notification service no nny…õ adwuma, y…õsr…õ wo san ma notification permission no ny…õ adwuma
Hokwan biara nni h…î s…õ wob…õkenkan mfiri ho ns…õm
Mma ho kwan biara nni h…î s…õ wob…õsesa nhyehy…õe nhyehy…õe ahorow
Gye di
∆êhia s…õ wode script dwumadie no y…õ adwuma ankasa (klik, mia so tenten, swipe, ne nea …õkeka ho), s…õ w…îagyae a, script a …õny…õ adwuma a …õy…õ adwuma ankasa nkutoo na wob…õtumi ay…õ.
%d scripts a …õretu mmirika no agyae
Console a w…îde y…õ adwuma
To menu a …õw…î ase h…î no mu
Bue menu a …õw…î ase h…î no
Mfomso…î:
Fael no nni h…î
Fael akenkan ne kyer…õw ho kwan biara nni h…î
Mf…õnsere a …õsens…õn nsu so ho kwan biara nni h…î
Script biara nni h…î a …õretu mmirika
Kwan no y…õ hunu
Saa script yi hwehw…õ Auto.js version number %d anaa nea …õboro saa na ama ay…õ adwuma
Saa script yi hwehw…õ s…õ saa Android version yi betumi ay…õ adwuma:
Gesture monitoring no nny…õ adwuma, y…õsr…õ wo ma …õny…õ adwuma w…î software nhyehy…õe mu
Key monitoring no nny…õ adwuma, y…õsr…õ wo ma …õny…õ adwuma w…î software nhyehy…õe no mu
Fi ase y…õ adwuma
